_meta.purpose: Onboarding content map for BAINTU to wire into the app. Do not modify without coordinating with Danny.

hard_rules: Andrew is a 1099 subcontractor — no I-9, no employee eligibility, no citizenship or immigration fields.
Do not ask Andrew to type SSN or TIN into any app field. W-9 is an upload only, stored private.
W-9 document must never be rendered back to the subcontractor or any non-admin user in the UI.

checklist.title: Profile & Address
checklist.helper_text: Enter your legal name, phone number, mailing address, and contact information.

checklist.title: Emergency Contact
checklist.helper_text: Provide the name and phone number of someone we can contact in an emergency.

checklist.title: IRS W-9
checklist.helper_text: Upload your completed IRS W-9 form. This is required for 1099 tax reporting. Upload only — do not type your SSN or TIN into any app field.

checklist.title: Driver License / Government ID
checklist.helper_text: Upload a clear photo or scan of your valid driver license or government-issued photo ID.

checklist.title: Certificate of Insurance (COI)
checklist.helper_text: Upload your current certificate of insurance. Spec Com, LLC must be listed as additional insured. Required minimums: $2M commercial general liability · $1M auto liability · $1M employers' liability · $1M umbrella.

checklist.title: Workers' Comp Certificate or Exemption
checklist.helper_text: Upload your workers' compensation certificate of coverage, or a state-issued sole-proprietor exemption letter if one applies to you. Contact Spec Com if you are unsure.
checklist.required_note: Required unless a valid state exemption applies. Admin will review and confirm.

checklist.title: Spec Com Subcontractor Agreement
checklist.helper_text: Read the full Spec Com, LLC Subcontractor Agreement for telecommunications and fiber construction services. This is a binding legal contract. You may consult an attorney before signing.

checklist.title: Bucket Truck Rental Agreement
checklist.helper_text: Review and sign the Spec Com bucket truck rental agreement for the Ruidoso, NM project. Choose Option A ($800/week — Spec Com provides insurance) or Option B ($500/week — you provide insurance with proof of COI).
checklist.ui_note: Show insurance option selector (Option A / Option B) before signature. Store selected option in signature_data or as a metadata field if the schema is extended.

checklist.title: Subcontractor Rate Sheet
checklist.helper_text: Review your approved Spec Com subcontractor pricing. Tap Acknowledge to confirm you have read and accept these rates.

checklist.title: Safety & Work Rules
checklist.helper_text: Read and acknowledge Spec Com's safety requirements, drug and alcohol policy, and workplace rules. These apply on all project sites and must be followed at all times.

checklist.title: Submit for Review
checklist.helper_text: All steps are complete. Tap Submit to send your onboarding package to the Spec Com team. You'll be notified once your documents are reviewed and approved.
checklist.gate: all required steps must pass fn_subcontractor_onboarding_missing()

schema_delta.note: Apply migration before BAINTU wires in steps 6, 8, and 9. Steps 1–5, 7, 10, 11 work against the existing schema already deployed in 20260623000001.
